name: taprun
description: Leo's private engineering methodology toolkit — verification gates, constraint-driven development, engineering philosophy, planning, task execution, and demand archaeology.

plugins.name: taprun
plugins.description: Engineering methodology skills derived from first principles: verify (deterministic verification gates), constraint-driven-development (RED→GREEN→Why), engineering-philosophy (12-fact framework for architecture and product tradeoffs), writing-plans (intent-verification decomposition), run-task (semi-autonomous task execution), demand-archaeologist (evidence-based demand discovery).
